mapper.select: SELECT p.payment_order_id AS paymentOrderId, p.order_no AS orderNo, p.channel_transaction_no AS channelTransactionNo FROM t_payment_order p INNER JOIN t_prepay_order pr ON pr.payment_order_id = p.payment_order_id WHERE p.status IN ('PREPAY_CREATED', 'WAIT_CALLBACK') AND pr.expires_at < NOW() GROUP BY p.payment_order_id, p.order_no, p.channel_transaction_no ORDER BY MIN(pr.expires_at)

SELECT p.payment_order_id AS paymentOrderId, pr.prepay_order_no AS prepayOrderNo, b.bill_no AS billNo, p.order_no AS orderNo, p.customer_name AS customerName, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(p.amount, 2)) AS amount, p.payment_method AS paymentMethod, p.channel_code AS channel, p.channel_transaction_no AS channelTransactionNo, pa.terminal AS latestTerminal, pa.client_ip AS latestClientIp, pa.idempotency_key AS latestIdempotencyKey, pa.attempt_status AS latestAttemptStatus, pa.attempt_status_type AS latestAttemptStatusType, pa.request_payload AS latestRequestPayload, pa.response_payload AS latestResponsePayload, p.status, p.status_type AS statusType, DATE_FORMAT(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM t_payment_order p LEFT JOIN t_prepay_order pr ON pr.id = ( SELECT latest_pr.id FROM t_prepay_order latest_pr WHERE latest_pr.payment_order_id = p.payment_order_id ORDER BY latest_pr.created_at DESC, latest_pr.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN t_bill b ON b.order_no = p.order_no LEFT JOIN t_payment_attempt pa ON pa.id = ( SELECT latest_pa.id FROM t_payment_attempt latest_pa WHERE latest_pa.payment_order_id = p.payment_order_id ORDER BY latest_pa.created_at DESC, latest_pa.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE p.payment_order_id = #{paymentOrderId}
SELECT order_amount FROM t_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
SELECT paid_amount FROM t_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
SELECT customer_name FROM t_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
SELECT bill_no FROM t_bill WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_bill(bill_no, order_no, customer_name, bill_amount, paid_amount, bill_status, bill_status_type, due_at, created_at) VALUES (#{billNo}, #{orderNo}, #{customerName}, #{orderAmount}, #{paidAmount}, #{billStatus}, #{billStatusType}, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), NOW())

INSERT INTO t_payment_order(payment_order_id, order_no, customer_name, amount, payment_method, channel_code, channel_transaction_no, status, status_type, created_at) VALUES (#{paymentOrderId}, #{orderNo}, #{customerName}, #{amount}, '待选渠道', #{channelCode}, '', 'PREPAY_CREATED', 'info', NOW())

INSERT INTO t_prepay_order(prepay_order_no, bill_no, order_no, customer_name, amount, pay_scene, cashier_title, cashier_status, cashier_status_type, payment_order_id, created_at, expires_at) VALUES (#{prepayOrderNo}, #{billNo}, #{orderNo}, #{customerName}, #{amount}, #{payScene}, #{cashierTitle}, '待支付', 'warn', #{paymentOrderId}, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR))
mapper.select: SELECT prepay_order_no AS prepayOrderNo, bill_no AS billNo, order_no AS orderNo, customer_name AS customerName, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(amount, 2)) AS amount, pay_scene AS payScene, cashier_title AS cashierTitle, cashier_status AS cashierStatus, cashier_status_type AS cashierStatusType, payment_order_id AS paymentOrderId, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(expires_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS expiresAt FROM t_prepay_order WHERE prepay_order_no = #{prepayOrderNo}

SELECT pr.prepay_order_no AS prepayOrderNo, pr.bill_no AS billNo, pr.order_no AS orderNo, pr.customer_name AS customerName, CONCAT('¥', FORMAT(pr.amount, 2)) AS amount, pr.pay_scene AS payScene, pr.cashier_title AS cashierTitle, pr.cashier_status AS cashierStatus, pr.cashier_status_type AS cashierStatusType, pr.payment_order_id AS paymentOrderId, p.status AS paymentStatus, DATE_FORMAT(pr.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(pr.expires_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS expiresAt FROM t_prepay_order pr INNER JOIN t_payment_order p ON p.payment_order_id = pr.payment_order_id WHERE pr.order_no = #{orderNo} AND pr.expires_at > NOW() AND pr.cashier_status IN ('待支付', '支付中') AND p.status IN ('PREPAY_CREATED', 'WAIT_CALLBACK') ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC, pr.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), ' | ', notify_type, ' | ', notify_status) AS item FROM t_payment_notify_log WHERE payment_order_id = #{paymentOrderId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), ' | ', route_rule, ' | ', route_result) AS item FROM t_payment_route_record WHERE payment_order_id = #{paymentOrderId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT CONCAT(event_type, ' | ', event_topic, ' | ', publish_status, ' | ', DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) AS item FROM t_payment_event WHERE payment_order_id = #{paymentOrderId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT payment_order_id FROM t_prepay_order WHERE prepay_order_no = #{prepayOrderNo}
SELECT order_no FROM t_prepay_order WHERE prepay_order_no = #{prepayOrderNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_prepay_order SET cashier_status = '支付中', cashier_status_type = 'info' WHERE prepay_order_no = #{prepayOrderNo}

UPDATE t_payment_order SET payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, channel_code = #{channelCode}, channel_transaction_no = #{channelTransactionNo}, status = 'WAIT_CALLBACK', status_type = 'warn' WHERE payment_order_id = #{paymentOrderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_payment_notify_log(notify_no, payment_order_id, channel_code, notify_type, notify_payload, notify_result, notify_status, notify_status_type, created_at) VALUES (#{notifyNo}, #{paymentOrderId}, #{channelCode}, #{notifyType}, #{notifyPayload}, #{notifyResult}, #{notifyStatus}, #{notifyStatusType}, NOW())

INSERT INTO t_payment_route_record(route_no, payment_order_id, channel_code, route_rule, route_result, created_at) VALUES (#{routeNo}, #{paymentOrderId}, #{channelCode}, #{routeRule}, #{routeResult}, NOW())

INSERT INTO t_payment_event( event_no, event_type, payment_order_id, biz_no, downstream_system, event_topic, publish_status, publish_status_type, retry_count, last_published_at, next_retry_at, event_payload, created_at ) VALUES ( #{eventNo}, #{eventType}, #{paymentOrderId}, #{bizNo}, CASE WHEN #{eventType} = 'PAYMENT_SUCCESS' THEN 'accounting-system,clearing-system,settlement-system' WHEN #{eventType} = 'PAYMENT_CLOSED' THEN 'accounting-system' WHEN #{eventType} = 'PAYMENT_SUBMIT' THEN 'gateway-access' ELSE 'payment-core-ops' END, CASE WHEN #{eventType} = 'PAYMENT_SUCCESS' THEN 'payment.trade.succeeded.v1' WHEN #{eventType} = 'PAYMENT_CLOSED' THEN 'payment.trade.closed.v1' WHEN #{eventType} = 'PAYMENT_EXPIRED_CLOSED' THEN 'payment.trade.expired-closed.v1' WHEN #{eventType} = 'PAYMENT_SUBMIT' THEN 'payment.trade.submitted.v1' ELSE 'payment.trade.pending.v1' END, 'PENDING', 'warn', 0, NULL, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE), #{eventPayload}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO t_payment_attempt(attempt_no, prepay_order_no, payment_order_id, channel_code, payment_method, terminal, client_ip, idempotency_key, request_payload, response_payload, attempt_status, attempt_status_type, created_at) VALUES (#{attemptNo}, #{prepayOrderNo}, #{paymentOrderId}, #{channelCode}, #{paymentMethod}, #{terminal}, #{clientIp}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{requestPayload}, #{responsePayload}, #{attemptStatus}, #{attemptStatusType}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM t_payment_order WHERE channel_code = #{channelCode} AND status IN ('WAIT_CALLBACK', 'SUCCESS') AND created_at >= CURDATE() AND created_at < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
